package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// scenario for prometheus_observe_without_timer: manual `time.Since(start).Seconds()` + `histogram.Observe(duration)` patterns when `prometheus.NewTimer` would be safer
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario421Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	_ = os.Getenv("FEATURE_FLAG")
	return http.Get(url)
}
